channel.title: Manila in 1819 on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Manila in 1819 on Maharlikanism

item.title: Manila Bay, the People
item.description:
The fine bay of Manila is 30 leagues in circumference.

The dangerous part of it is small. With proper attention, it is easily avoided.

item.title: The Galleon Trade
item.description:
The people of Manila have long enjoyed the privilege of sending 2 annual ships to Acapulco called Galleons, Navios, or Register-Ships. These carry the produce of:

  • the Philippines
  • China
  • other parts of Asia

In return, they receive various South American products. The principal of which are:
